briefdescription.para: Result of the insertion of a new symbol.
Map of string transition symbols to symbol values.
Next value to be used for a newly added symbol.
Create alphabet from a list of symbol names.

parameterdescription.para: Start of a sequence of values to use for new symbols.

briefdescription.para: Get a set of all symbols in the alphabet.

detaileddescription.para: The result does not have to equal the list of symbols in the automaton using this alphabet.

briefdescription.para: complement of a set of symbols wrt the alphabet
Translate internal symbol representation back to its original string name.

detaileddescription.para:
Throws an exception when the symbol is missing in the alphabet.
symbol
Symbol to translate.
symbol original name.

briefdescription.para: Expand alphabet by symbols from the passed symbol_names.

detaileddescription.para:
Adding a symbol name which already exists will throw an exception.
symbol_names
Vector of symbol names.

briefdescription.para: Expand alphabet by symbols from the passed symbol_map.

detaileddescription.para:
The value of the already existing symbols will NOT be overwritten.
new_symbol_map
Map of strings to symbols.

briefdescription.para: translates a string into a symbol
Translate sequence of symbol names to sequence of their respective values.
Add new symbol to the alphabet with the value of next_symbol_value.

detaileddescription.para: Throws an exception when the adding fails.

simplesect.para: Result of the insertion as InsertionResult.

briefdescription.para: Add new symbol to the alphabet.

detaileddescription.para: Throws an exception when the adding fails.

parameterdescription.para: Number of the symbol to be used on transitions.

simplesect.para: Result of the insertion as InsertionResult.

briefdescription.para: Try to add symbol to the alphabet map.

detaileddescription.para: Does not throw an exception when the adding fails.

parameterdescription.para: Number of the symbol to be used on transitions.

simplesect.para: Result of the insertion as InsertionResult.

briefdescription.para: Get the next value for a potential new symbol.
Get the number of existing symbols, epsilon symbols excluded.
Get the symbol map used in the alphabet.

simplesect.para: Map mapping strings to symbols used internally in Mata.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the alphabet has any symbols.
Update next symbol value when appropriate.

detaileddescription.para:
When the newly inserted value is larger or equal to the current next symbol value, update the next symbol value to a value one larger than the new value.
value
The value of the newly added symbol.

briefdescription.para: Remove a symbol name value pair specified by its symbol from the alphabet.

simplesect.para: Complexity: O(n), where n is the number of symbols in the alphabet.

briefdescription.para: Remove a symbol name value pair specified by its symbol_name from the alphabet.
Remove a symbol name value pair from the position pos from the alphabet.
Remove a symbol name value pair from the positions between first and last from the alphabet.
also translates strings to symbols
Check whether two alphabets are equal.

detaileddescription.para:
In general, two alphabets are equal if and only if they are of the same class instance.
other_alphabet
The other alphabet to compare with for equality.
True if equal, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check whether two alphabets are equal.

detaileddescription.para:
In general, two alphabets are equal if and only if they are of the same class instance.
other_alphabet
The other alphabet to compare with for equality.
True if equal, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: An alphabet constructed 'on the fly'.

detaileddescription.para: Should be use anytime the automata have a specific names for the symbols.
